name: photutils (Astronomical Photometry Tools)

performance.notes: NumPy-based; large images (JWST, HST) can be slow without chunking

agent_readiness.notes: Astronomical source detection and photometry. from photutils.detection import DAOStarFinder. daofind = DAOStarFinder(fwhm=3.0, threshold=5.*std). sources = daofind(data - median). from photutils.aperture import CircularAperture, aperture_photometry. apertures = CircularAperture(positions, r=4.0). phot_table = aperture_photometry(data, apertures). PSF photometry: from photutils.psf import PSFPhotometry, IntegratedGaussianPRF. Background: from photutils.background import Background2D, MedianBackground. Segmentation: detect_sources, SourceCatalog. JWST/HST image analysis.

gotchas: PSF photometry setup is complex (PRF model + fitting options)
Background subtraction choices significantly affect results
DAOStarFinder assumes point sources — extended sources need segmentation approach
best_when: Aperture photometry of stars and galaxies (HST, JWST, ground-based)
avoid_when: When SExtractor is preferred for catalog production
summary: photutils provides astronomical source detection and photometry. DAOStarFinder(fwhm=3, threshold=5*std)(data). aperture_photometry(data, CircularAperture(positions, r=4)). PSFPhotometry for crowded fields. Background2D subtraction. SourceCatalog from segmentation. BSD-3 by Astropy. Standard for HST/JWST/ground-based photometry pipelines. PSF photometry is complex. Background subtraction crucial for accurate results.
